User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user account in the Kith chat application. Stores core profile information and online status. Authentication details (passwords, tokens) are handled externally.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

username.description: Unique display name chosen by the user.

email.description: User's email address, used for account recovery or notifications.

profilePictureUrl.description: URL to the user's profile picture or avatar.

onlineStatus.description: Indicates if the user is currently online (true) or offline (false).

lastActiveAt.description: Timestamp of the user's last known activity.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user's profile information was last updated.

ChatRoom.title: ChatRoom
ChatRoom.description: Represents a conversation channel, which can be either a one-on-one private chat or a group chat. It links participants and provides metadata about the conversation.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ChatRoom entity.

name.description: The name of the chat room. Required for group chats. Can be null or system-generated for one-on-one chats.

isGroupChat.description: Flag indicating if this is a group chat (true) or a one-on-one private chat (false).

memberIds.description: References to Users who are members of this chat room. (Relationship: User N:N ChatRoom)

members.description: Map of user IDs to booleans for security rules indexing.

pinnedBy.description: Map of user IDs to booleans indicating if this room is pinned for them.

createdBy.description: Reference to the User who created this chat room. Applicable primarily for group chats. (Relationship: User 1:N ChatRoom)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the chat room was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the chat room's properties (e.g., name, members) were last updated.

lastMessageText.description: Text preview of the last message sent in this room.

lastMessageSenderId.description: UID of the sender of the last message.

Message.title: Message
Message.description: Represents an individual message sent within a chat room, including its content, sender, and status.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Message entity.

chatRoomId.description: Reference to the ChatRoom where this message was sent. (Relationship: ChatRoom 1:N Message)

senderId.description: Reference to the User who sent this message. (Relationship: User 1:N Message)

content.description: The textual content of the message.

replyToId.description: Reference to the ID of the message being replied to.

fileUrl.description: URL to the shared file or image, if the message type is 'image' or 'file'.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the message was originally sent.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the message was last edited.

isEdited.description: Flag indicating if the message has been edited since it was originally sent.

isDeleted.description: Flag indicating if the message has been soft-deleted by the sender.

readBy.description: An array of User IDs who have read this message, enabling read receipts.

reactions.description: An array of emoji reactions on this message.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

definition.description: Stores metadata for each chat conversation.

params.name: chatRoomId
params.description: The unique identifier for the chat room.

definition.description: Stores individual messages sent within a chat room.

params.name: chatRoomId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent chat room.

params.name: messageId
params.description: The unique identifier for the message.
